title: Handmade Resin Name Plate
description:
Add a touch of elegance to your entryway with our handmade resin name plate. 

Crafted with premium quality resin, real crystals, and gold details, each piece is unique and made to last.


Material: Premium Resin, Real Crystals, Gold Paint

Size: Each plate approx. 10 x 6 inches

Thickness: 8-10 mm

Customization: Names can be customized (font, text & layout)

Installation: Comes with gold chains and hooks for easy hanging

Usage: Suitable for outdoor & indoor use
